primitives.label: Observe
primitives.definition: Locate/retrieve relevant facts as they are stored, with provenance.

primitives.label: Explain
primitives.definition: Articulate why/how — mechanisms, differences, causal chains.

primitives.label: Recommend
primitives.definition: Rank/advise a course of action under goals and constraints.

primitives.label: Generate
primitives.definition: Create new candidate artifacts (formulations, hypotheses) — always unvalidated.

primitives.label: Validate
primitives.definition: Qualify evidence / test claims toward validated knowledge (human-gated).

primitives.label: Learn
primitives.definition: Turn outcomes into retained, reusable knowledge (ΔK).

derived.label: Compare
derived.definition: Contrast two or more subjects on shared axes.
derived.rule: observe over >=2 subjects, then explain the differences on shared properties.

derived.label: Diagnose
derived.definition: Infer the likely cause of an observed phenomenon (e.g. a failure).
derived.rule: observe symptoms, explain candidate mechanisms, predict which is most likely; output ranked causes (hypotheses).

derived.label: Optimize
derived.definition: Find the best trade-off among conflicting goals under constraints.
derived.rule: generate candidates, predict their properties, recommend the Pareto-preferred set.

derived.label: Prioritize
derived.definition: Rank options/questions by value (e.g. what to learn next).

taskTypes.label: Comparison
taskTypes.definition: Which of these is better, and why?

taskTypes.label: Ideation
taskTypes.definition: Expand the possibility space with new candidates.

taskTypes.label: Experiment Planning
taskTypes.definition: What experiment gives the most knowledge per cost?

taskTypes.label: Prediction
taskTypes.definition: What will happen under these conditions?

taskTypes.label: Selection
taskTypes.definition: Choose a material/product for a use-case.

taskTypes.label: Solution Discovery
taskTypes.definition: End-to-end: find a new solution to an engineering goal.
